whatYouGet.title: Everything you need to start building

items.title: Stripe

socialProof.quote: This saved me days of setup.

faq.title: What to know before you buy

items.question: What am I buying exactly?
items.answer: A downloadable SaaS starter kit with auth, billing, dashboard, and a clean project structure.

items.question: Who is it for?
items.answer: Developers and indie builders who want to save time and start from a clean base.

items.question: How do I get access?
items.answer: Buy once, get access to the downloadable starter kit, and start building right away.

finalCta.title: Ready to build your SaaS faster?
finalCta.description: Get the starter kit and start working on your product today.
